blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: light rain, highs of 44°F, winds around 23 mph.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
